name: Rotini with Zucchini and Ham
recipeIngredient: 1/2 lb Cooked ham, cut in strips
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the rotini to desired doneness as directed on the package; drain. Keep warm.
2. Meanwhile, heat oil in a large skillet over medium heat until hot. Add carrots and onion; cook and stir 2 to 3 minutes or until crisp-tender. Add zucchini; cook 1 to 2 minutes or until crisp-tender.
3. Stir in ham and fennel seed; cook 1 to 2 minutes or until thoroughly heated.
4. Add the rotini to the ham mixture; toss gently to combine.
Nutrition Information Per Serving:
320 Calories, 10 g Fat, 830 mg Sodium
